creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Hi, Sylvio.

I prepared the update. Log:
- update to 2.2.0
- update distfile mirrors (SF doesn't hold a new version)
- remove dependency on aspell, add dependency on gucharmap
  per offsite docs
- remove unexisting --without-gnome2_4-mime and
  --without-gnome2_4-appreg
- add --with-gtk2 to force it to use gtk20 for now
- remove SPLASH option. There is no --disable-splash-screen
  anymore.
- make WITHOUT_NLS actually work
- cleanup pkg-plist

Patch:    http://people.freebsd.org/~rm/bluefish-2.2.0.diff.txt
Buildlog: http://people.freebsd.org/~rm/bluefish-2.2.0.log
Changelog: http://bluefish.openoffice.nl/index.html

I can commit it for you if you approve.
Btw, i'd remove www/bluefish-devel - it's older than www/bluefish
itself.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
